MELItem.Title: Overhead Flight Attendant Rest (OFAR) Duct Heater System

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the overhead flight attendant rest (OFAR) duct heater (AMM DDG 21-41-02).

ListItem.Para: Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open circuit breaker HEATER-ATTEND CREW REST and lock with an INOP tag.
Gain access to flight attendant rest duct heater.
Disconnect, cap and stow electrical connector to flight attendant rest duct heater.
Temperature control will be degraded and the OFAR may not be usable.
Cold crew rest temperature can be mitigated by disabling the humidifier. To disable the humidifier, follow the procedures in MEL item 21-71-03.
